description_long: This is a green glass bottle with a slightly tapered cylindrical body and a short neck, topped with a natural cork stopper. The bottle features a large, tan-colored label wrapped around its midsection, adorned with decorative scrollwork and a cluster of grapes illustration, suggesting it may contain wine or a similar beverage. The label also displays stylized, serifed text in a dark color, though the script appears non-standard or decorative. The glass surface has a matte, slightly frosted finish, giving it a subdued sheen rather than a glossy shine. The bottle's proportions and size suggest it is designed for personal use, likely holding between 250 to 500 milliliters of liquid. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A green glass bottle with a cork stopper and a decorative tan label featuring grapes and ornate text. The surface is matte and the bottle is in good condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan label with grape illustration and stylized text clearly visible, cork stopper on top.
description_view_1: Angled view with the label partially visible, showing the bottle's green glass and the cork stopper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green glass surface with no label or markings visible.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the edge of the label and the grape illustration, with the cork stopper visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Tan label with decorative border, grape illustration, and stylized dark text wrapping around the bottle's midsection.
